title: Maisonnette
description: A decoration mod with a stir of art-deco and a dash of academia
body: ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/653d3306f6a3d7b52dfa967a2121fbf7c344fde5.png) A building mod inspired by the likes of Befoul and [ContentContent](https://modrinth.com/mod/contentcontent), with themes of academia and art-deco. If you have an idea to contribute to this mod, please make an issue on the [Github](https://github.com/capozi-devv/Maisonnette) for your suggestion. ## Current Content **Blocks:** - Seats - More Calcite Blocks - More Tuff Blocks - Copper Torchbulbs - Placeable Books - New wood type: Willow Wood - New wood type: Charred Wood **Biomes:** - Red Willow Forests - Orange Willow Forests - Yellow Willow Forests
